title: Production deployment of SecurelyTime

requirements.text: Deploy the current version of the SecurelyTime application to production on the Internet Computer network.
acceptanceCriteria: The application is successfully deployed to the IC mainnet
The frontend is accessible via the securelytime.com domain
The backend canister is live and responding to search queries

constraints: Do not modify any application logic or UI during this deployment
Preserve the existing domain configuration for securelytime.com
nonGoals: Changing the UI or backend logic
